results.question: How many tracks are in the database?
results.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS TrackCount FROM Track;

results.question: How many customers are there?
results.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS NumberOfCustomers FROM Customer;

results.question: How many genres are there?
results.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS GenreCount FROM Genre;

results.question: How many invoices are there?
results.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS InvoiceCount FROM Invoice;

results.question: List the 3 artists with the most albums.
results.generated_sql:
SELECT Artist.Name, COUNT(Album.AlbumId) AS AlbumCount
FROM Artist
JOIN Album ON Artist.ArtistId = Album.ArtistId
GROUP BY Artist.ArtistId
ORDER BY AlbumCount DESC
LIMIT 3;
results.gold_sql: SELECT ar.Name, COUNT(al.AlbumId) AS album_count FROM Artist ar JOIN Album al ON ar.ArtistId = al.ArtistId GROUP BY ar.ArtistId ORDER BY album_count DESC LIMIT 3

results.question: Which country has the most customers?
results.generated_sql: SELECT Country FROM Customer GROUP BY Country ORDER BY COUNT(CustomerId) DESC LIMIT 1;
results.gold_sql: SELECT Country FROM Customer GROUP BY Country ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: How many tracks are longer than 5 minutes?
results.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Track WHERE Milliseconds > 300000;
results.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Track WHERE Milliseconds > 300000

results.question: How many tracks have no composer listed?
results.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Track WHERE Composer IS NULL OR TRIM(Composer) = '';
results.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Track WHERE Composer IS NULL

results.question: What is the name of the longest track?
results.generated_sql: SELECT Name FROM Track ORDER BY Milliseconds DESC LIMIT 1;
results.gold_sql: SELECT Name FROM Track ORDER BY Milliseconds DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: List the top 3 genres by number of tracks.
results.generated_sql:
SELECT Genre.Name, COUNT(Track.TrackId) AS TrackCount
FROM Genre
JOIN Track ON Genre.GenreId = Track.GenreId
GROUP BY Genre.GenreId
ORDER BY TrackCount DESC
LIMIT 3;
results.gold_sql: SELECT g.Name, COUNT(t.TrackId) AS track_count FROM Genre g JOIN Track t ON g.GenreId = t.GenreId GROUP BY g.GenreId ORDER BY track_count DESC LIMIT 3

results.question: Which customer has spent the most money in total?
results.generated_sql:
SELECT c.CustomerId, c.FirstName, c.LastName, SUM(i.Total) AS TotalSpent
FROM Customer c
JOIN Invoice i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId
GROUP BY c.CustomerId, c.FirstName, c.LastName
ORDER BY TotalSpent DESC
LIMIT 1;
results.gold_sql: SELECT c.FirstName, c.LastName FROM Customer c JOIN Invoice i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId GROUP BY c.CustomerId ORDER BY SUM(i.Total) DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Which genre has produced the most revenue from sales?
results.generated_sql:
SELECT Genre.Name
FROM Genre
JOIN Track ON Genre.GenreId = Track.GenreId
JOIN InvoiceLine ON Track.TrackId = InvoiceLine.TrackId
GROUP BY Genre.GenreId
ORDER BY SUM(InvoiceLine.UnitPrice * InvoiceLine.Quantity) DESC
LIMIT 1;
results.gold_sql: SELECT g.Name FROM Genre g JOIN Track t ON g.GenreId = t.GenreId JOIN InvoiceLine il ON t.TrackId = il.TrackId GROUP BY g.GenreId ORDER BY SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity) DESC LIMIT 1
